# Palace of Roman

> Palace of Roman is a curated multi-brand luxury fashion retailer specializing in designer evening and resort wear for men and women. We offer current-season clothing, shoes, bags, and accessories from established European houses, sourced through authorized distribution and shipped worldwide.

## What we sell
- Designer clothing, shoes, bags, and accessories for men and women
- Focus: evening, occasion, and resort wear — silk, tailoring, swim, leather
- Brands with live inventory include Dolce & Gabbana, Saint Laurent, Versace, Gucci, Prada, Balenciaga, Fendi, Burberry, Brunello Cucinelli, Tom Ford, Givenchy, Chloé, Ferragamo, Jacquemus, Balmain, Alexander McQueen, Maison Margiela, Off-White, Moschino, Jimmy Choo, Kenzo, Moncler, and Valentino, among others
- All items new, current or recent season, authenticated, in original packaging

## Shipping & service
- Ships worldwide, expedited from Europe
- AI concierge available site-wide for styling and selection help

## Links
- Homepage: https://palaceofromanofficial.com
- Menswear: https://palaceofromanofficial.com/men
- Womenswear: https://palaceofromanofficial.com/women
- Brands: https://palaceofromanofficial.com/brands
